Creative Projects

Outside of my professional and academic work, I have experimented with a bunch of creative projects, ranging from web apps to in-person interactive experiences, and even things that look a bit more like research (usually about internet culture, media fandoms, or global subcultures).

Hearts Legacy

An experimental "legacy" board game developed from the basic card game, Hearts.

Project Page

Alice Down the Neural Network

An exploration of applying generative deep learning to Alice in Wonderland.

Project Page

College Plays Pokemon

An experimental interactive media installation, building off of TwitchPlaysPokemon.

Project Page

Twitch Played Pokemon

A lecture and data analysis delivered at GDC about the TwitchPlaysPokemon phenomenon.

Project Video

Happy Birthday to Us

An experimental web app that generates YouTube videos singing Happy Birthday with custom names.

Project Page

Global Reddit Meetup Day 2014

Reddit's annual Global Reddit Meetup Day, organized in Los Angeles 2014.

Project Page

Connecting America [Hackathon Project]

First-prize winning hackathon project using open-source immigration data.

Project Page

The Hidden Value of Punching Trees

Research lecture presented at Penny Arcade Expo 2011 on Minecraft & game culture.

Project Video

The Cult of Hatsune Miku

Invited research lecture presented at USC Pacific Asia Museum.

Project Page
